cards.front: What is the primary function of a CPU?
cards.back: The primary function of a CPU is to execute instructions and perform calculations

cards.front: What is a bus in computer organization?
cards.back: A bus is a communication pathway that allows different components of a computer to exchange data

cards.front: What is the purpose of a memory management unit (MMU)?
cards.back: The purpose of an MMU is to translate virtual addresses to physical addresses, allowing multiple programs to share the same physical memory

cards.front: What is the difference between a hard drive and a solid-state drive (SSD)?
cards.back: A hard drive uses physical disks and seeks, while an SSD uses flash memory and doesn't have moving parts
A microprocessor is a central processing unit (CPU) that contains the entire processing system on a single chip of silicon
